fires.name: Nebraska Panhandle Fires
fires.summary: Largest wildfire in Nebraska history, burning over 640,000 acres with 1 fatality. Conditions beginning to ease. 15% contained.

fires.name: Colorado Wildfires (South of Colorado Springs)
fires.summary: Multiple active wildfires in Colorado including fire near Colorado 115 that broke containment with over 4,600 acres burned. Highway 115 remains closed. Ongoing evacuations.

fires.name: Belmore State Forest Wildfire
fires.summary: Large wildfire in Belmore State Forest, Clay County, Florida. Fire Rescue actively working on containment.

fires.name: Casper Area Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire near Casper, Wyoming prompting evacuations amid record-high temperatures.

fires.name: Sevier County Wildfire
fires.summary: 50-acre wildfire in Sevier County, Utah driven by winds, putting structures at risk.

fires.name: Cross Creek Wildfire
fires.summary: 126-acre wildfire in marshland near Cross Creek, Florida prompting family evacuations.

fires.name: Kansas Wildfire (northwest)
fires.summary: Large wildfire in northwest Kansas brought under control, avoiding devastating event to nearby city.

fires.name: Nacimiento Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire in New Mexico with firefighters actively engaged in containment efforts.

fires.name: Butler County Wildfire
fires.summary: Very large wildfire in Butler County being contained.

fires.name: Montana Wildfires
fires.summary: Multiple wildfires in Montana burning more than 2,000 acres.

fires.name: Hawaii Wildfire (Lahaina aftermath)
fires.summary: Recovery and rebuilding efforts ongoing following 2023 Lahaina wildfire. Bracing for rain impacts on burn scars.

fires.name: Sandia Crest Area Mitigation
fires.summary: Sandia Crest to partially close until 2027 for wildfire mitigation work.

notes: Deduped: Sask wildfire funding (2 CBC/Global articles merged), Colorado Springs fires (multiple reports consolidated into one active fire entry)

Rerouted: Smithers BC guide (kept in world_fires as regional preparedness), invasive grasses post-wildfire (academic/policy, not active fire), Indigenous communities impact (policy article, not fire event)

Preserved active fires: Nebraska Panhandle, Colorado Springs area, Florida (Belmore + Cross Creek), Wyoming (Casper), Utah (Sevier), New Mexico (Nacimiento), Montana, Butler County, Kansas (contained)
Merged: Colorado reports into single active entry with updated acreage; Florida fires separated into two entries (Belmore and Cross Creek)
High fatality event noted: Florida sheriff's deputy death during wildfire evacuations (2026-03-22)
